title: phebalium squamulosum subsp. alpinum
intro: Phebalium squamulosum subsp. alpinum, also known as Alpine Phebalium, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alpine Phebalium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Alpine Phebalium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research and potential interactions with medications.
